chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C.P No.D-568 of 2025 Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on office objections 2. For hearing of CMA No.2608/2025 3. For hearing of main case. 13.05.2025 Mr. Asadullah Brohi, advocate along with Petitioners Mr. Mehboob Ali Wassan, AAG Mr. Khaleel Ahmed Maitlo, DPG along with Malik Aziz-ur- Rehman, P.S. Iqbal Market, Karachi (West) ***************** Statements have been filed on behalf of Respondents No.1 & 2, which are taken on record. SIP Malik Aziz-ur-Rehman of P.S Karachi (West)/ I.O of 300/2025 registered at P.S. Iqbal Market, Karachi (West) has filed a statement along with progress report, which is taken on record. The Investigation Officer of aforesaid FIR is present and, upon directions of this Court, has recorded statement under Section 161 Cr.P.C of the Petitioner No.1 namely Mst. Saima wherein she denied the allegation of such FIR and supported the contentions made in the instant petition. I.O submitted such statement of Mst. Saima, which is taken on record. He further submits that after the statement of petitioner Mst. Saima, he will file report by cancelling the case under “C” class. Such exercise shall be completed by the I.O within 15 days. After the statement of the I.O, the counsel for petitioners seeks disposal of the instant petition and prayed that legal protection may be provided to the petitioners. This petition is disposed of along with pending application, with direction to the I.O to file report under “C” class as suggested by him within 15 days. Official Respondents are directed to provide protection to the petitioners, as and when they require.

This petition is disposed of along with pending application, with direction to the I.O to file report under “C” class as suggested by him within 15 days. Official Respondents are directed to provide protection to the petitioners, as and when they require. JUDGE JUDGE Faisal Mumtaz/PS
